description: You are a Backend Engineer instrumenting a new payment gateway service. Verify that custom business metrics flow through the local StatsD daemon into Graphite and build a dashboard correlating them with underlying infrastructure. Generate continuous StatsD metrics to 127.0.0.1:8125 via UDP for `payment.success:1|c` (at ~5-10 events/sec) and `payment.failure:1|c` (at ~1 event/sec). In the Graphite web interface (http://localhost/), create and save a dashboard named 'Payment Gateway' featuring the following graphs: 'Live Throughput' displaying `stats.counters.payment.success.rate` and `stats.counters.payment.failure.rate`; 'Success Ratio' displaying `asPercent(stats.counters.payment.success.rate, sumSeries(stats.counters.payment.*.rate))`; and 'System Impact' displaying `sumSeries(stats.counters.payment.*.rate)` and `secondYAxis(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization)`.
